diseases.name: Dengue
diseases.home_care: Maintain strict hydration, drink ORS, and take complete rest. You can take Paracetamol for fever control. Absolutely DO NOT take Ibuprofen or Aspirin.
diseases.next_steps: Immediately visit the nearest healthcare clinic to get a complete blood count (CBC) and platelet check.

diseases.name: Common Cold / Viral Fever
diseases.home_care: Inhale steam, gargle with warm salt water, stay hydrated with warm fluids, and rest properly.
diseases.next_steps: Monitor symptoms closely. If the fever persists for more than 3 days, consult a physician.
